text: A woman and man riding an elephant through a forest.
A man does work in parking lot with a fire hydrant.
Many people stand in an open square with umbrellas on a grey day.
A night city scene is lit up with cars and busses.
Loaded french fries in a container sitting beside a hotdog.
A little boy holding a remote control in his hand.
Three people riding on a elephant with two in a basket on the back.
A grilled chicken burger and ketchup covered fries on takeout paper
a very tall building with a city clock on it
An empty bench on an empty sidewalk in front of some shops.
